questions.question_text: Date of Assessment
Name of Assessor
Date of next review (12 months)
Risk 1 - Low/No Oxygen (patients). Existing: daily check, 24-hour ordering, spare tank in place. Further actions?
Risk 1 - Low/No Oxygen: actions in place - confirm with signature or initials.
Risk 2 - Pregnant team members (clinical team and patients). Existing: pregnancy risk assessments, COSHH eval, alt protocols.Further actions?
Risk 2 - Pregnant team members: actions in place - confirm with signature or initials.
Risk 3 - Emergency Drugs not in place (Flumazenil/Midazolam, clinical team and patients). Existing: weekly checks, reorder 8 weeks pre-expiry. Further actions?
Risk 3 - Emergency Drugs: actions in place - confirm with signature or initials.
Risk 4 - Emergency Oxygen equipment unavailable (clinical team and patients). Existing: daily Oxygen cylinder green check. Further actions?
Risk 4 - Emergency Oxygen equipment: actions in place - confirm with signature or initials.
Risk 5 - Defibrillator not working (clinical team and patients). Existing: daily defib check (battery + pads expiry). Further actions?
Risk 5 - Defibrillator: actions in place - confirm with signature or initials.
Risk 6 - Regular Audits not conducted (clinical team and patients). Existing: 6-monthly record card audits, annual sedation audits. Further actions?
Risk 6 - Regular Audits: actions in place - confirm with signature or initials.
Risk 7 - Adverse events not recorded (clinical team and patients). Existing: training, reporting methods, event review. Further actions?
Risk 7 - Adverse events: actions in place - confirm with signature or initials.
Risk 8 - Never Events (Midazolam over-sedation; oxygen monitoring failure in non-N2O sedation; clinical team and patients). Must report to NRLS. Further actions?
Risk 8 - Never Events: actions in place - confirm with signature or initials.
Risk 9 - Using paper records (clinical team and patients). Existing: thorough records of treatment, medication, adverse reactions. Further actions?
Risk 9 - Paper records: actions in place - confirm with signature or initials.
Any additional findings to be noted
